courseTitle: Multiplayer, Networked Play, and Live Operations
title: Player-Generated Content Game
genericDescription: Let players create content safely; constrain creation tools; make sharing or replaying meaningful.
specificDescription: Build a game with a level, card, puzzle, avatar, rule, or challenge creator. Include at least three creator-made examples and basic validation against broken submissions.
gradingRubric: 30 pts creator tool design; 20 pts validation; 20 pts quality of examples; 15 pts sharing/replay flow; 15 pts documentation.
